title: Research Central Pack
description: In the realm of the TTRP MC Server, there is a faction called Research Central. We do a few things, and some of those things need custom textures!
body:
Welcometh all! 

This pack is made for the "Research Cemtral" Faction within the TallTalesRP server.
You will need this for our Eldorath Report, and to see any custom items that we may create!

Signed, Leeroy Vern
